name: Peanut Butter Cookies/Martha White
recipeInstructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit. Cream together the butter, peanut butter, and sugars in a mixing bowl until light and fluffy. Add the egg and vanilla extract; beat well. Sift the flour, baking soda, and salt together; blend into the creamed mixture. Shape the dough into 1-inch balls and arrange them 2 inches apart on an ungreased baking sheet. Press the balls of dough with a floured fork to flatten and create a criss-cross design. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes or until golden brown. Cool on wire racks.
